query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN a.email LIKE '%@test.com' THEN 'TESTE'
    ELSE 'REAL'
  END as tipo,
  COUNT(*) as qtd,
  GROUP_CONCAT(a.name ORDER BY a.name SEPARATOR ' | ') as nomes
FROM alunos a
WHERE a.isActive = 1 AND a.bypassOnboarding = 1
GROUP BY tipo;
